name: FreshBooks
description: Cloud-based accounting software for small businesses and freelancers, offering invoicing, expense tracking, time management, and financial reporting. Over 30M users; valued at ~$1B.

name: Wave
description: Canadian fintech offering free accounting, invoicing, and receipt scanning software for small businesses and freelancers. Acquired by H&R Block in 2019.

name: Xero
description: New Zealand-based cloud accounting platform for small businesses, offering invoicing, bank reconciliation, expense claims, and payroll. 3.5M+ subscribers globally. Toronto office.

name: Coast Capital Savings
description: Member-owned financial cooperative in British Columbia, serving 600,000+ members with banking, wealth management, auto finance, and mortgage services.

name: Desjardins Group
description: North America's largest cooperative financial group, offering banking, insurance, and wealth management. Primarily serves Quebec and Ontario.

name: Meridian Credit Union
description: Ontario's largest credit union with 380,000+ members and $28.5B+ in assets under administration. Full range of banking, lending, and investment services across 88 branches.

name: Servus Credit Union
description: Alberta's largest credit union, offering personal and business banking, lending, and investment services across the province.

name: Vancity
description: Canada's largest community credit union, based in Vancouver, with a focus on social and environmental sustainability alongside full banking services.

name: Bitbuy
description: Canadian cryptocurrency exchange for buying, selling, and trading digital assets. First regulated crypto marketplace in Canada. Acquired by WonderFi in 2022.

name: Blockstream
description: Bitcoin infrastructure company building technologies like the Liquid Network sidechain and satellite-based Bitcoin network access.

name: Coinsquare
description: Canadian cryptocurrency trading platform for buying, selling, and managing digital assets including Bitcoin and Ethereum.

name: Figment
description: Toronto-based blockchain staking infrastructure provider. Valued at ~$1.4B. Named a top 250 fintech by CNBC in 2024. Raised ~$165M in funding.

name: EQ Bank
description: Canadian digital bank (subsidiary of Equitable Bank) offering high-interest savings accounts, GICs, and everyday banking with no monthly fees.

name: KOHO
description: Canadian fintech offering a no-fee spending and savings account with cashback rewards, budgeting tools, credit building, and early payroll access via mobile app.

name: Motive Financial
description: Digital banking division of Canadian Western Bank, offering high-interest savings accounts and GICs. Parent company acquired by National Bank in 2024.

name: Motusbank
description: SHUT DOWN (2025). Digital bank created by Meridian Credit Union in 2019. Only reached 16,000 members. Accounts absorbed by Meridian and Coast Capital. Final shutdown Nov 2025.
notes: Wound down 2025; accounts moved to Meridian/Coast Capital

name: N26
description: German neobank offering a fully digital banking experience with real-time notifications, budgeting tools, and no foreign transaction fees via mobile app.

name: Neo Financial
description: Canadian fintech offering high-interest savings, cashback credit card, and money management. Ranked #1 on Canada's Top Growing Companies 2024 (38,431% 3-year revenue growth). ~$500M raised.

name: Nubank
description: Brazilian digital bank and one of the world's largest neobanks, offering no-fee credit cards, personal loans, insurance, and investment products.

name: Revolut
description: UK-based global neobank offering multi-currency accounts, money transfers, crypto trading, and budgeting tools through its mobile app.

name: Simplii Financial
description: Canadian direct banking brand (CIBC subsidiary) offering no-fee chequing and savings, mortgages, and investments. ~2M customers.

name: Tangerine
description: Canadian direct bank (subsidiary of Scotiabank) offering no-fee chequing and savings accounts, credit cards, and investment products. ~2M customers.

name: Ant Group
description: Chinese financial technology conglomerate (Alibaba affiliate) operating Alipay and offering payments, lending, insurance, and wealth management services.

name: Bench
description: SHUT DOWN (Dec 2024). Online bookkeeping service for SMBs. Burned through $135M in VC funding before abrupt closure. Acquired by Employer.com days later. ~35,000 customers affected.

name: Bolt
description: Privacy-focused fintech building cryptographic payment channel technology for anonymous and secure digital transactions.

name: Brim Financial
description: Canadian fintech offering rewards credit cards with no foreign transaction fees and integrated financial management features.

name: Plaid
description: Financial data connectivity platform enabling applications to securely connect with users' bank accounts for payments, lending, and personal finance.

name: Plooto
description: Canadian fintech automating accounts payable and receivable workflows for SMBs and accounting firms, with domestic and international payment capabilities.

name: Plusgrade
description: Montreal-based fintech. Received $1B PE investment from General Atlantic (March 2024). Provides ancillary revenue solutions for travel and financial services.

name: Sensibill
description: Canadian fintech providing receipt management and expense tracking solutions for banks and credit unions to embed in their digital banking apps.

name: Shopify
description: Canada's largest tech company. Major fintech play via Shopify Payments, Shopify Balance (banking), and Shopify Capital (merchant lending). Powers millions of merchants globally.

name: Manulife Bank
description: Canadian bank subsidiary of Manulife Financial (which manages $72B+ in assets). Offers the Manulife One all-in-one mortgage and banking account.

name: Sun Life
description: Major Canadian financial services company specializing in insurance, wealth management, and asset management with global operations across North America and Asia.

name: Questrade
description: Canadian online brokerage offering self-directed and managed investing with low commissions, ETF purchases, and registered accounts.

name: Robinhood
description: US-based platform offering commission-free stock, ETF, options, and cryptocurrency trading through a mobile-first interface.

name: SoFi
description: US digital personal finance company offering investing, student loan refinancing, personal loans, credit cards, and banking products.

name: TMX Group
description: Operates the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) and TSX Venture Exchange. Cornerstone of Canada's capital markets infrastructure.

name: Wealthsimple
description: Canada's leading fintech for investing. $72B+ in assets under administration (late 2025). Offers zero-commission trading, crypto, tax filing, no-fee chequing, and AI-powered research tools.

name: Affirm
description: US fintech offering buy-now-pay-later installment plans at point of sale, with transparent pricing and no late fees.

name: Borrowell
description: Canadian fintech providing free credit scores, credit monitoring, and AI-powered product recommendations for loans and credit cards.

name: Brex
description: US fintech offering corporate credit cards and spend management software for startups and growing businesses.

name: Chime
description: US fintech offering fee-free mobile banking with early direct deposit, automatic savings, and a secured credit-building credit card.

name: Clearco
description: Canadian fintech originally offering revenue-based financing for e-commerce/SaaS companies. Underwent major downsizing in 2022-2023 and pivoted from original model.

name: Financeit
description: Canadian fintech providing point-of-sale consumer financing for home improvement, retail, and healthcare merchants.

name: Flexiti Financial
description: Canadian fintech specializing in point-of-sale consumer financing and private-label credit cards for retail and healthcare. Acquired by CURO Group.

name: FundThrough
description: Canadian fintech providing invoice funding for small businesses, allowing them to access cash tied up in unpaid invoices.

name: Klarna
description: Swedish fintech offering buy-now-pay-later payment solutions, smooth checkout experiences, and a shopping app for consumers and merchants globally.

name: Mogo
description: Canadian fintech offering digital financial products including free credit score monitoring, personal loans, mortgage solutions, and crypto trading.

name: Propel Holdings
description: Toronto-based fintech lender focused on underserved consumers. Record Q3 2025: US$152M revenue (+30% YoY). One of Canada's fastest-growing fintech lenders.

name: Alipay
description: China's leading digital payment platform (operated by Ant Group) supporting mobile payments, money transfers, and financial services for over 1 billion users.

name: Payoneer
description: Global financial services company providing cross-border payment solutions for freelancers, SMBs, and marketplaces.

name: Paytm
description: Indian digital payments and financial services company offering mobile payments, e-commerce, banking, and wealth management.

name: Remitly
description: US-based digital remittance service enabling international money transfers via mobile app, focused on immigrant communities. Canadian office in Vancouver (opened 2024).

name: Versapay
description: Canadian fintech specializing in cloud-based accounts receivable automation and B2B payment solutions.

name: Wise (TransferWise)
description: Global fintech offering low-cost international money transfers and multi-currency accounts using the mid-market exchange rate.

name: Adyen
description: Dutch fintech providing a single payments platform for in-store, online, and mobile commerce for enterprise merchants globally.

name: Interac
description: Canadian interbank network operating the national debit card system and Interac e-Transfer, Canada's most-used peer-to-peer payment service.

name: KUBRA
description: Mississauga-based provider of billing, payment, and customer communication solutions for utilities, healthcare, waste management, and auto financing.

name: Lightspeed Commerce
description: Montreal-based POS and payment platform for retail and hospitality. Q3 FY2025 revenue $280M (+17% YoY). Expanding across North American retail and European hospitality.

name: Mastercard
description: Global payment technology company facilitating electronic funds transfers through its branded credit, debit, and prepaid card networks.

name: Moneris
description: Canada's largest payment processor (joint venture of RBC and BMO), providing POS terminals, e-commerce solutions, and merchant services.

name: Nuvei
description: Canadian payment technology company. Taken private by Advent International in $6.3B deal (2024). Supports 700+ alternative payment methods worldwide.

name: PayPal
description: Global digital payments platform enabling online money transfers, serving consumers and merchants with checkout, invoicing, and credit services.

name: Payments Canada
description: National organization responsible for Canada's payment clearing and settlement infrastructure.

name: Square (Block)
description: US fintech (now Block, Inc.) offering POS hardware, payment processing, small business lending, and the Cash App consumer platform.

name: Stripe
description: Global payment infrastructure company providing APIs for online payment processing, billing, fraud prevention, and financial management.

name: Trulioo
description: Vancouver-based identity verification platform covering 195 countries, 14,000+ ID documents, and 700M+ business entities. Serves banks and fintech clients including EQ Bank.

name: AMEX Bank of Canada
description: Canadian subsidiary of American Express, offering charge cards, credit cards, and business payment solutions.

name: ATB Financial
description: Alberta-based Crown corporation providing personal and business banking, lending, wealth management, and insurance services.

name: Alterna Bank
description: Canadian digital bank subsidiary of Alterna Savings, offering high-interest savings, no-fee chequing, GICs, and mortgages.

name: BMO
description: Canada's fourth-largest bank (Big Five), offering personal and commercial banking, wealth management, and capital markets across North America.

name: CIBC
description: Canada's fifth-largest bank (Big Five), providing personal and business banking, wealth management, and capital markets services.

name: Canadian Western Bank
description: Western Canada-focused bank providing personal and business banking, equipment financing, and trust services. Acquired by National Bank in 2024.

name: Citibank Canada
description: Canadian branch of Citigroup, offering commercial and institutional banking services. Exited Canadian consumer banking in 2023.

name: Concentra Bank
description: Canadian wholesale bank serving credit unions with liquidity management, lending, and trust services. Subsidiary of Equitable Bank.

name: First Nations Bank of Canada
description: Canada's first Indigenous-owned bank, providing personal and business banking services with a focus on Indigenous communities.

name: Home Trust / Oaken Financial
description: Canadian bank offering mortgages, credit cards, and commercial lending. Oaken Financial is its digital savings and GIC brand with competitive rates.

name: JP Morgan Bank Canada
description: Canadian operations of JPMorgan Chase, offering institutional banking, asset management, and treasury services.

name: Laurentian Bank
description: Quebec-based bank offering personal and commercial banking, with a focus on real estate and commercial lending.

name: National Bank
description: Canada's sixth-largest bank, headquartered in Montreal. Personal, commercial, and wealth management services. Acquired Canadian Western Bank in 2024.

name: Peoples Group
description: Vancouver-based bank offering high-interest savings, GICs, mortgages, and prepaid card solutions. Includes Peoples Trust and Peoples Bank of Canada.

name: RBC
description: Canada's largest bank by market capitalization (Big Five). Personal and commercial banking, insurance, wealth management, and capital markets globally.

name: Scotiabank
description: Canada's third-largest bank (Big Five), with significant international presence in Latin America and the Caribbean. Net income ~US$7.76B (FY2025).

name: Shinhan Bank Canada
description: Canadian subsidiary of South Korea's Shinhan Financial Group, offering personal and business banking services.

name: TD Bank
description: Canada's second-largest bank (Big Five) and a top-10 North American bank. Personal and commercial banking, wealth management, and insurance.

name: Wealth One Bank of Canada
description: Canadian digital-first bank offering high-interest GICs and savings products, serving personal and commercial clients.
